data.body:
Shipped for review 2026-06-29:
- GitHub issue: navapbc/oscer#722 (minimal version-bump tracking issue, assigned giverm)
- PR: navapbc/oscer#723 (base `main`, Resolves #722) — branch `giverm/template-infra-update-v0.20.0`, 2 phase commits.

PR body documents conflict resolutions + local verification (fmt/init/validate clean under AWS v6.50.0). Flagged in PR: do not apply until `terraform plan` per env reviewed; close superseded Dependabot #705; reconcile new DDE files with DocAI infra #679.

Note: issue could not be set to "In Progress" via gh — OSCER has no status label and the local gh token lacks `project` scope (board status). Mike to set on the project board, or refresh scope.
